leader.name: Sanjeet Singh
leader.title: Leader
leader.bio: Heads the Business Enablement & Testing org across 5 global locations, driving quality engineering, automation, and product enablement at scale.

managers.name: Subhransu Das
managers.title: Senior Manager
managers.responsibilities: Leads QA strategy, manual & functional testing, and test governance across DMS and Global Health platforms.

managers.name: Dheeraj Mishra
managers.title: Senior Manager
managers.responsibilities: Drives product discovery, roadmap planning and stakeholder enablement for the Rx and Health platforms.

managers.name: Dharmendra Bhardwaj
managers.title: Senior Manager
managers.responsibilities: Owns workflow engineering, low-code automation and integration delivery for enterprise business processes.

managers.name: Rohit Garg
managers.title: Senior Manager
managers.responsibilities: Leads test automation frameworks, CI/CD quality gates and AI-assisted QA innovations across the org.

pods.name: Testing Centre of Excellence
pods.focus: Manual, functional and regression testing across all release trains. Owns end-to-end test plans, defect triage, UAT coordination, and release sign-offs.

pods.name: Product Management COE
pods.focus: Roadmap, discovery, backlog grooming and stakeholder communication. Drives product vision, OKRs, market research and go-to-market readiness.

pods.name: Workflow Development
pods.focus: Workflow engines, BPM, integrations and process automation. Builds resilient services, event pipelines and low-code orchestration for enterprise flows.

pods.name: Automation & AI POD
pods.focus: Selenium/Playwright automation, AI test generation, CI/CD quality. Embeds GenAI into QA, expands coverage, and shortens release cycles.
